untranslatable_reason: This signal requires domain-specific derivatives pricing inputs (synthetic call price calculation, put prices, futures prices, strike prices, carrying costs) that are not available in the standard OHLCV indicator set. The rule compares synthetic_call_price > direct_call_price, which requires real-time option chain data and futures contract data not present in allowed indicators. The threshold parameters [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] are also unspecified in the source material.
translation_notes: NATENBERG_DRY_109_0 is a derivatives arbitrage rule requiring: (1) put price input, (2) futures price input, (3) strike price input, (4) carrying cost estimation, (5) direct call market price. None of these data types are available through the OHLCV/technical indicator framework. This rule is designed for options market-making/arbitrage trading, not price action analysis. To implement, a custom data feed with options chain and futures quotes would be required.
